title: Almondzanzibar
description: A light and sour Canadian dish featuring almonds as the main ingredient, designed to be a hangover-cure option in the form of a stir-fry.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and red pepper flakes, sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in almonds and cook for an additional minute, stirring occasionally.
Pour in soy sauce, tomato paste, and lime juice. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer gently for about 5 minutes or until flavors meld together and sauce thickens slightly.
Serve immediately as a side dish or over rice.
